template.ecommerce-coupon.name: E-commerce Coupon
template.ecommerce-coupon.description: Grant discount coupons based on cart amount, VIP level, and an active promotion window. A realistic decision flow you can wire into your checkout in minutes.
template.ecommerce-coupon.fact.cart-amou: Total cart amount in the smallest store currency unit.
template.ecommerce-coupon.fact.cart-item: Number of distinct SKUs in the cart.
template.ecommerce-coupon.fact.promotion: Whether the promotion window is currently open (set by the marketing scheduler).
template.ecommerce-coupon.concept.is-vip: True when user_vip_level >= 2 — used by the coupon flow to pick the VIP threshold.
template.ecommerce-coupon.concept.meets-: Cart total qualifies for the lower VIP threshold (>= 200).
Cart total qualifies for the standard threshold (>= 500).
template.ecommerce-coupon.msg.no-coupon: Cart does not meet any threshold.
template.ecommerce-coupon.msg.not-eligib: No active promotion at this time.
template.ecommerce-coupon.sample.vip-hit: Expected: GRANTED — 20% VIP discount on $300 cart.
template.ecommerce-coupon.sample.normal-: Expected: GRANTED — 10% standard discount on $800 cart.
template.ecommerce-coupon.sample.no-coup: Expected: NO_COUPON — cart below the standard threshold.
template.ecommerce-coupon.contract.in.us: Shopper unique identifier. Must be non-empty; used for audit trails.
VIP tier, integer 0–5. Defaults to 0 (regular) when absent.
template.ecommerce-coupon.contract.in.ca: Cart subtotal in the store's base currency unit (e.g. cents). Must be >= 0.
Number of distinct line items. Optional; not used by the current decision logic but logged for analytics.
template.ecommerce-coupon.contract.in.pr: Whether the marketing promotion window is open. Defaults to false when absent — the decision falls through to NOT_ELIGIBLE.
template.ecommerce-coupon.contract.out.d: Fractional discount (0.2 = 20%). Present only when coupon_type is 'vip' or 'standard'.
template.ecommerce-coupon.contract.out.o: Cart amount at the time of evaluation. Echoed back for downstream discount calculation.
template.ecommerce-coupon.contract.notes: P99 SLA is 10 ms (engine only, excluding network). cart_items_count is accepted but not evaluated — wire it up when tiered-quantity promotions are introduced.
template.ecommerce-coupon.test.vip-grant: VIP level 3, cart $350, promotion active → GRANTED with 20% VIP discount.
template.ecommerce-coupon.test.normal-gr: VIP level 1, cart $600, promotion active → GRANTED with 10% standard discount.
template.ecommerce-coupon.test.no-coupon: VIP level 1, cart $100, promotion active → NO_COUPON (cart below $500 threshold).
template.ecommerce-coupon.test.not-eligi: VIP level 3, cart $500, promotion inactive → NOT_ELIGIBLE regardless of user tier.
template.ecommerce-coupon.test.vip-bound: VIP level 2 with exactly $200 cart → should just clear the VIP threshold and get 20% off.
